title: 4th pre-merge CI gate: schema-level GRANT USAGE check

checks: Any new migration (num > 0406 or timestamp format) containing CREATE SCHEMA must have GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA <name> TO ih35_app in the same file or a co-committed migration file
ci_gate.fail_message: Schema '<name>' created but GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA ... TO ih35_app not found. Add it to prevent login outages.

incident_reference.root_cause: CREATE SCHEMA notifications + table-level GRANTs added without GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA notifications TO ih35_app
incident_reference.symptom: permission denied for schema notifications → login outage

evidence_note: NV-29-CLOSE 2026-06-26: allowed_files backfilled with verified on-main artifacts (registry was blank; feature already built).
